name: Farglory Land Development Co., Ltd.
summary: Farglory Land Development Co., Ltd. operates as a construction company in Taiwan. The company builds residential buildings and commercial buildings for sale and investment; undertakes public construction projects; and develops professional areas. The company was formerly known as Metropolitan Construction Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Farglory Land Development Co., Ltd. in December 2005. Farglory Land Development Co., Ltd. was founded in 1969 and is based in Taipei City, Taiwan.
